prompt: Single-area feedback: unmapped store message is dead end, too technical, no action button. One screenshot.

assertions.text: Extracts 2-3 findings: dead-end UX (no action), overly technical language, missing permission-gated action link
Proposes concrete replacement text — user suggested 'No foot traffic data yet' with 'Request data' link
SBE includes permission-gating consideration — user explicitly said 'if they have permission'
Does NOT add findings about issues the user did not mention (e.g., store name formatting, address display)
